_comment: Demo layered source for the localized-App-Store-Previews loop. Swap this (and the per-locale translations, and a real background) for your app's real screenshot composition. 'slots' matches cloud/src/engine/localizeScreenshots.ts LayeredSource: each named caption over the background, with the box it must fit and its base font size. The engine translates + auto-fits per locale; the renderer draws at the size the engine chose.

slots.text: Track keyword rankings before and after every change
